name: monero-mine-central
description: Desktop GUI for Monero daemon mining controls with fun pixel animations.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/copy-renderer-assets.ps1
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && electron-packager . "Monero Mine Central" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=release-current --overwrite --ignore="^/(src|docs|scripts|release|release-build|release-app|release-packaged|release-final|release-current|\.git|\.idea)$"
